---
title: "Long table of contents"
description: "Test navigation and rendering with a long table of contents."
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

This vignette tests a very long table of contents. You should be able to
navigate to a heading near the bottom of the document without scrolling all the
way down.

```{r}
#| echo: false
h2 <- paste0("## Heading ", t(outer(letters, 1:9, paste0)))
knitr::asis_output(paste(h2, collapse = "\n\n"))
```
